title: PIVOT payload
description: Emitted when an agent changes direction mid-task. The router immediately notifies any agents whose work was downstream of the original direction.

from_intention_id.description: The msg_id of the INTENTION being abandoned or changed.

to_intention.description: The new intention replacing the original. Same schema as INTENTION payload.

reason.description: Why the pivot. Critical for the coordinator and peers to understand the change.

affects.description: Agent IDs or scopes that this pivot impacts.

frees.description: Scopes that were claimed by the original intention and are now released.
